title: BackPackSSS ResourcePack
body:
This is the official resource pack for the BackPackSSS plugin. It provides high-quality 3D models and textures for your backpacks, ensuring they look great on your back and in your inventory.

Note: This pack is designed specifically for use with the BackPackSSS plugin. Without this pack, your backpacks will appear as default items (like Chests or Leather).

What’s inside?

3D Models: Custom 3D meshes for all backpack tiers.

Tiered Textures: Unique visuals for Weak, Good, and Strong backpacks (based on CustomModelData).

Optimized: Uses a 16x resolution to maintain the classic Minecraft aesthetic while staying lightweight for your server performance.

How to use:

Download this Resource Pack.

Install it in your .minecraft/resourcepacks folder or host it on your server.

Make sure the BackPackSSS plugin is installed to see the 3D models in action! Credit: Duong2012G Pack inspiration came from datapack Backpacks!/Eclipse Studios (Available on Modrinth)
